commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow code/test repair that automation can attempt on the PR branch.; Needs attention: The diff improves package metadata validation but leaves a concrete symlink validation gap in the release inventory generator.; Review finding: [P1] Reject symlinks in release content inventory — scripts/openclaw-cross-os-release-checks.ts:788-790 (sha=d694e2b5aded874380d7a43d41bb40bb4c0ee9ca)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds package `dist` content inventory metadata, local override capture/recovery, opt-in local override reapply behavior, update CLI reporting, package acceptance checks, tests, and docs for package-manager updates.

PR surface: Source +675, Tests +884, Docs +9, Other +179. Total +1747 across 17 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection plus a local Node probe show `statSync` follows a symlink to a file, matching the proposed release script check. Current main does not include the new content-inventory path, so this is PR-introduced rather than an existing current-main bug.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow code/test repair that automation can attempt on the PR branch.
